derivation_source: Exact clean commit-bound tested-site bundle from GitHub Actions build run 29234323320; deployed and attested by run 29234640734 without rebuilding.

artifact_formats.notes: Mutable live channel deployed from the exact tested v2.3.0 bundle and publicly attested against source commit e27661166e9105f37cb36d63b15795f80715ca24 in run 29234640734.
19,088,343 bytes; 274 regular-file members; SHA-256 ebb3cccb0841a15a49d7d20ee8d5c7f7dce97dac562ca05068025951274ee28c; public redownload verified byte-for-byte.
These formats and editions are explicitly outside the v2.3.0 release scope and are neither generated nor approved by this record.

validation_commands: gh release download v2.3.0 and byte-for-byte SHA-256 verification

review_status.notes: All internal content, structure, continuity, rendering, browser, proof, evidence, rights, tested-artifact, archive, public-redownload, and attestation gates passed. No external-human prepublication review was requested or claimed.

companion_material.review_notes: No companion edition is part of this release.

human_consumption_gate.notes: The canonical HTML surface passed internal continuity, live-view, accessibility, and desktop/mobile browser checks; unselected formats remain outside scope.

audiobook_gate.notes: Audio is outside the v2.3.0 release scope.

release_notes: The ASI Stack v2.3.0 completes the Post-v2.2 Implementation and Book Completion Roadmap. It publishes a deterministic twelve-lane QCSA reference package, 2,340 frozen held-out predictions over 60 cases, 13 systems, and three seeds, one 13-stage governed vertical trace, ten non-core dispositions, nine core no-change decisions, and reconciliation across nine existing chapters. The matched-advantage and resource gates failed, active-question value was refuted on this corpus, and no chapter-core support state was promoted. Tag-bound rights-routing snapshot SHA-256: db8b98dac9327da13fc5c9fbf00ccdf8e1a071b10d2124259a0e31481037b14d.
residuals: All 54 chapter-core claims remain at argument support; this release creates no chapter-core support-state promotion.
Eight QCSA residuals preserve natural-task, learned-model, evaluator-independence, production, rollback-scope, privacy, security, and universal-grounding burdens.
The live root and /latest/ channels are mutable; the GitHub Release archive is the immutable v2.3.0 rendered-site artifact.
EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, and curated-reader editions remain outside this release.
No external-human prepublication review, independent audit, DOI, or external peer review is claimed.
non_claims: does not prove ASI or AGI capability, production readiness, deployment safety, economic value, or universal governance correctness
does not promote any chapter-core claim above its recorded argument state
does not generalize the synthetic QCSA corpus or hand-authored vertical trace to open-world, learned-model, or production behavior
does not claim matched-resource advantage or active-question value beyond the exact frozen corpus
does not claim released EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, or curated-reader artifacts
does not claim independent legal review, third-party ownership clearance, external audit, or external-human peer review
